notes: unknown top-level sparse-checkout subcommand prints stock unknown-subcommand usage with exit 129 instead of a custom unsupported-subcommand fatal diagnostic
unknown sparse-checkout set option prints stock command-specific usage with exit 129 instead of a custom fatal diagnostic
unknown sparse-checkout init option prints stock command-specific usage with exit 129 instead of a custom fatal diagnostic
stock Git rejects the non-sparse repository state before option parsing, with exit 128 and fatal no sparse-checkout diagnostic
unknown sparse-checkout add option prints stock command-specific usage with exit 129 after sparse-checkout is enabled
--stdin patterns override positional patterns, update sparse-checkout list and working tree, and exit 0 like stock Git
--stdin patterns override positional patterns while adding to existing sparse-checkout patterns, with matching list and working tree side effects
